'''Devish''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] living during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lieutenant Devish is found in the game files for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' under a directory<ref name="Directory">npc.location.open_worlds.class.sith_sorcerer.chapter_1.preparations</ref> for the [[Sith Inquisitor]] [[Darth Nox|player character's]] Chapter 1 mission "Preparations," he but does not appear in the live game.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{C|Cut}}
